name: Delphix
description: Delphix — Data operations platform for virtualizing, masking, and delivering fast test data from production snapshots.

seo.title: Delphix — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Delphix: Delphix — Data operations platform for virtualizing, masking, and delivering fast test data from production snapshots.

when_to_use: Deliver masked production snapshots to test environments
Virtualize multi-TB databases in minutes for testing
GDPR-compliant PII masking before dev/QA access
Self-service data provisioning for agile teams

pros: Near-instant virtual copies of huge production DBs
Strong masking plus delivery in one platform
Saves massive storage versus physical clones
Deep integration with Oracle, SQL Server, SAP
cons: Complex deployment, dedicated admins usually needed
Less compelling for cloud-native, small datasets
review.verdict: The heavyweight standard for test data virtualization, priced and staffed accordingly.
review.best_for: Large enterprises with massive relational DBs and strict data privacy rules
review.not_for: Startups or SaaS teams that can reseed small Postgres DBs in seconds

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
